prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is E-601 Grounding electrode system within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.6 Grounding & Bonding. The observed field condition is: clamp not listed for direct burial. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 250.50-250.68. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T1 E-601 Measurement & estimation
